content:
And uhh why the hell not, it should also be able to order you any ingredients might be missing for that dracula's breathe rum punch or whatever

Replies ›
The beauty is, the internal systems that make this Hosting app, the more video game or myth elements that is what fuels me, and the what seemed very far outside the others dog calendar, are all the same
Generative
personalized (100% unique)
Self improving / correcting
(both the soul of the software improves, and the user improves via education and joy and self reflective healing)
Systems that connect into a hub
OK so The last bit might've just taken a little bit of a leap with what I'm saying, but I really do think I'm almost there where I got it into a paragraph opposed to a 20 patient the nun Guiding document
